fiction.title: RITES OF THE STARLING
fiction.author: Devney Perry
fiction.description: The second book in the “Shield of Sparrows” series. Secrets uncovered may stop the devastation of a cursed realm.

fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: REVENGE PREY
fiction.author: John Sandford
fiction.description: The 36th book in the Prey series. Davenport and White must protect a Russian intelligence officer and his family who are in hiding.

fiction.title: THE CORRESPONDENT
fiction.author: Virginia Evans
fiction.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

fiction.title: STARSIDE
fiction.author: Alex Aster
fiction.description: Aris traverses a realm of magic and immortals, where she faces dangers as she seeks to avenge her family’s death.

nonfiction.title: LONDON FALLING
nonfiction.author: Patrick Radden Keefe
nonfiction.description: The author of “Say Nothing” details the efforts by the parents of a 19-year-old Londoner to uncover the truth about his mysterious death and secret life.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: PLANET MONEY
nonfiction.author: Alex Mayyasi and the hosts of NPR’s “Planet Money”
nonfiction.description: Stories illustrating global economic forces at work and how they impact decisions we make.

nonfiction.title: HERE WHERE WE LIVE IS OUR COUNTRY
nonfiction.author: Molly Crabapple
nonfiction.description: A portrayal of the Jewish Labor Bund, and the ways its development and dissolution resonate today.

nonfiction.title: STRIPPED DOWN
nonfiction.author: Bunnie Xo
nonfiction.description: The host of the “Dumb Blonde Podcast” shares how redemption was an important part of her journey toward reaching her goals.
